name: QUESTSCAPE: Survival
short_description: On a secluded medieval, awake in a small village surrounded by wildlife nature and bandits and many challanges. Evolve your land in search of new adventures.
detailed_description:
In this immersive adventure, you awaken with no recollection of your past.Waking up in a village he doesn't know, he goes in search of obtaining his memories., living sandbox surrounded by wildlife and nature. Scavenge materials and craft tools to build your own house. Survive by hunting cooking and growing your own food. Be careful though, the forest is as dangerous as it is wonderful.

Over time you will have your own land, evolve to be well accepted in the village, and with that you can have access to new adventures

- Gather natural resources such as special minerals and wood to build survival tools and structures

- Build a base and tools to survive

- Evolve your Land

- Hunt animals for food

- Use weapons to kill bandits
